title_primary: バスターズレディーゴー!
reasoning: Opening theme of Tokumei Sentai Go-Busters (특명전대 고버스터즈). Namu Wiki has a dedicated entry titled '버스터즈 레디 고!' confirming this exact Korean form (Hangul transliteration of the English katakana 'Busters Ready Go!').

title_primary: ビュンビュン!トッキュウジャー
reasoning: Ending theme of Ressha Sentai ToQger (열차전대 토큐저, confirmed by Namu Wiki/KO Wikipedia). 'ビュンビュン' is an onomatopoeia (whoosh/zoom); standard Korean transliteration is '뷴뷴'. 'トッキュウジャー' is established as '토큐저' in Korean tokusatsu fandom. No single source pin for the exact title string, hence medium.
doa's '英雄' is an insert/theme song from Kamen Rider Kiva. Standard hanja-to-Hangul reading 英雄 → 영웅. Direct lexical equivalence; no transliteration needed.

title_primary: 炎神戦隊ゴーオンジャー
reasoning: Main theme / series title. Korean Wikipedia and Namu Wiki both use '염신전대 고온저' as the canonical Korean rendering (炎神戦隊 → 염신전대 hanja reading; ゴーオンジャー → 고온저).

title_primary: 仮面ライダー BLACK RX
reasoning: Established Korean title on both Namu Wiki and Korean Wikipedia. 仮面ライダー → 가면라이더 (standard); 'BLACK RX' is preserved as Latin in Korean references.

title_primary: 烈車戦隊トッキュウジャー
reasoning: Series title; Korean Wikipedia and Namu Wiki both use '열차전대 토큐저' as canonical Korean rendering (烈車戦隊 → 열차전대 hanja reading; トッキュウジャー → 토큐저).
